author: lucassaldanhaconsensys
content: Question for CL clients: what is the current state of the legacy deposit fetching logic in your codebase atm? Did you remove it completely? Is it sitting there in case someone starts a pre-Fulu network or sync from genesis? etc?

author: tersec
content: also it doesn't matter for sync from genesis. Nimbus supports that fine

author: nflaig
content: same for Lodestar, completely removed it but we can still sync from genesis, also in theory can still run a pre-Electra network but deposits won't work

author: tersec
content: which has its uses actually, one can for a test network just do all the deposits in genesis, and that would be consistent with this

author: lucassaldanhaconsensys
content: Thanks for the info folks! Now I feel safe deleting it 😄
